sizing_rule.note: Scale position size to account equity at 1 contract per $10,000 (0.8% per $10k). Monitor drawdown tolerance at 80% threshold. Recalculate when equity changes by $2,500. Combines fixed fractional sizing with drawdown monitoring to maintain acceptable risk levels.

source_rule_text: A trader should scale position size proportionally to account equity and risk tolerance to ensure drawdowns remain within acceptable limits and avoid catastrophic losses.
